gaps.description: Architecture says src/types.ts contains 'Provider' and 'ToolDefinition' (line 11) but both are actually defined in src/providers/provider.ts; types.ts imports Provider but does not define it
ToolDefinition interface uses field name 'parameters' in code (provider.ts:10) but architecture calls it 'input schema' (line 43); field naming mismatch between design and implementation

Architecture says src/providers/provider.ts is 'custom provider support' (line 15) but it actually contains Provider interface, ToolDefinition, ProviderResponse, ProviderMessage, createProvider() factory, and detectProvider() — much broader role than documented
Architecture says src/providers/index.ts is 'createProvider() factory' (line 16) but createProvider() is defined in provider.ts; index.ts is a barrel re-export
Architecture says src/tools/index.ts is 'tool registry' (line 22) but it's a barrel export; the tool registration logic (buildToolDefs) lives in src/ask.ts
Architecture Provider Resolution fallback example (line 51) shows createOpenAIProvider(baseUrl, apiKey, model) but actual code passes the full config object: createOpenAIProvider(config)
ARCHITECTURE.md lines 55-75 contain leftover prompt/task instructions that are not part of the architecture documentation — should be removed for documentation integrity
Architecture Key Interfaces section (line 40) omits toolConfig from AgenticConfig fields; code includes toolConfig?: { search?: { apiKey?, provider? }, code?: { timeout? } }
Architecture Overview (line 5) states 'exposes a single ask() function' but index.ts also exports createProvider factory — public API is ask() + createProvider(), not just ask()
All 12 source files exist exactly as listed in Module Structure section
Data flow matches design exactly: ask() → createProvider() → loop provider.chat() → stopReason tool_use check → executeToolCalls() → return AgenticResult
Custom provider fallback chain implemented correctly: customProvider → use directly; baseUrl → createOpenAIProvider(config); neither → throw error
All four tool implementations present and matching design: search (Tavily/Serper), code (QuickJS/Pyodide/python3), file (AgenticFileSystem), shell (agentic-shell)
All key interfaces implemented: AgenticConfig, AgenticResult, Provider with chat() method, ToolDefinition with name/description/parameters
